column2:
I was worried, you know.
Since you suddenly fainted.
You've been asleep the whole time.

But it looks like I was worried for nothing.
How are you feeling? Nothing hurts?

I'm fine. My head's just a bit blank.
But...

Maybe I'm still dreaming. In front of me...
There's a huge human, as big as a wall...

...Teehee. I knew it.
I would look that way to you, wouldn't I?

But this is reality.
I can see your little figure just fine.

And it's not that I'm big.
Take a look around you.
Is this a desk for giants?
Wrong again. I'm a normal human, and this is a normal desk. It's a study desk made of red pine. I've been using it for ten years or so.
Now, for the correct answer. You're the one who's gotten smaller. That's why everything looks big to you.
Who knows? I'd like the answer myself.
I saw you walking outside, tiny as a doll. I thought it'd be dangerous for you out there so I took you home right away.
Correct. Just an eight-tatami one-room apartment. But it must look as large as a palace to you, right?
...Hey, what are you going to do now? The outside world is full of dangers for a tiny thing like you.
I'll help you look for a way to change back, so why don't you live with me until then?
I'll take care of everything for you while you're here.
Hehe. Are you feeling nervous? Don't worry. You aren't any trouble at all.

Oh, right. Tell me about you.
What's your name? What kind of person are you?

You can't remember?
Don't tell me you've lost your memory?
It seems like it. When I try to remember anything besides my name, um...
...Oh dear, that's a bit of a situation.
Okay. I'll help you find a way to get both your memories and your size back. We can work together.
My name is Saeko. Written with the character Sae meaning cold and clear like moonlight.

It's nice to meet you too.
I hope we'll enjoy our time together.
No need to be afraid. It'll be fine.

Let's go together.
I'll give you a full tour of your new home...
